---
name: 🧩 Verification Failure
about: For when the captcha thinks you're a toaster.
title: "[VERIFY-FAIL] "
labels: help wanted, investigation
assignees: afifashamsadvivo
---

### 😵 What happened?
Did the checkbox disappear? Did the puzzle get stuck in an infinite loop?

### 🚦 The Console Logs
If you're tech-savvy, open the browser console (F12) and paste any red error messages here.

### 🌐 Network Conditions
Are you using a VPN, a proxy, or are you trying to access the grid from a smart fridge?

### 🕵️‍♂️ Proof of Humanity
On a scale of 1 to 10, how sure are you that you aren't actually a robot?
